items.title: Oil Could Hit $90, Goldman Sachs Says: 'Trump May Not Ease Sanctions' On Russia
items.author: Piero Cingari
items.description: Goldman Sachs warns that oil prices could surge to $90 per barrel under a worst-case scenario of simultaneous supply disruptions from Russia and Iran, as the Biden administration imposes new sanctions on Russia's energy sector.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article presents Goldman Sachs' analysis and scenarios for oil prices, but does not indicate a positive or negative sentiment towards the company itself.
